notes: A brand-new Remixa - your own app window, home screen, render queue with live progress, and faster rendering. Clips you've used before now start instantly.
_urls: Both urls are GitHub Release assets (stable, public, direct .exe/.dmg) and sha256 pins the exact binary - the 2.9.8+ updater verifies the download against it before offering to install. Assets use customer-friendly names (Remixa-Windows.exe / Remixa-Mac.dmg) since v2.9.18; the release TAG carries the version. Every ship must upload BOTH assets and update BOTH blocks.
